description: Style Notetonga gives the trend for glitter a stylish twist with this one shoulder dress. Its blended fabric composition and knit lining makes the dress cling ever so slightly to your body, giving you a flattering silhouette. Pair it with shiny stilettos and long earrings to take any party by storm.Product DetailsBeige and golden one shoulder sheath dress, three fourth net sleeves, knit lining with net overlayMaterial and Care80% Nylon 20% LurexHand wash coldDo not bleachSize and Fit Slim fitThe model( height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
